listeners.purpose: The atomic pass-consume hook. Runs BEFORE all other listeners on this event.
The atomic pass-refund hook. Reverses the consume-side hook.
Rolling-window check. Fires AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached when count crosses policy.max_unexcused_absences_per_period.
P1 cascade — pauses the athlete's membership via membership::MembershipObserver.setStatus('paused').

When absence.status='unexcused' AND applicable policy.no_show_fee_cents > 0 AND tenant holds attendance_no_show_fees entitlement, dispatches ChargeNoShowFeeJob to create the invoice via finance::invoice.
Optional in-band absence detection. Immediately sweeps expected attendees on session completion.
Cascade — every existing AttendanceRecord for the cancelled session transitions to soft-deleted via AttendanceCancelled. Refunds every consumed Pass in one transaction.
Refuses session archive when active attendance records exist.
Refuses enrollment hard-delete when attendance records reference it.
Cascade — future check-ins for the athlete's active enrollment will refuse with ATTENDANCE_NO_ACTIVE_PASS because no valid Pass exists. Also emits a diagnostic event for admin visibility.
Cascade delete via FK. Compliance archive rows survive per compliance module.
